data.title: Tanglang
data.title_japanese: 螳螂
data.synopsis:
A woman makes her nocturnal rounds seducing and harvesting men in Yonfan and Joe Hsieh’s dive into motherhood’s most primal realms, delivering an elegant and menacing animated thrill ride made of stylish gore and a touch of vintage erotic.

(Source: Toronto International Film Festival)

data.title: Cool de M
data.title_japanese: クール de M
data.synopsis: Teacher Shiino Asami is quite popular at the academy where she teaches. One evening, she finds one of her students lying on the ground and bruised. She takes him in, and they become more intimate.

data.title: Wadachi wo Koete Yuke
data.title_japanese: 轍を越えてゆけ
data.synopsis:
In the shadow of a ruinous war, three young women are serving as soldiers in a barren, snow-swept landscape. Their task is to scour the frozen wastes for stragglers of the Iron Army, eerie, formerly human flesh-weapons. Gros and especially the inexperienced Leichte admire Esus, stronger and wiser than they. Esus has her weaknesses, though, and unhealed wounds in her heart. Somewhere out there in the vast, deadly sea of snow lie answers—to Esus' pain, and to the awful secret of this war.

(Source: Official Site)

titles.title: Recycling Scrap in the Celestial Court

data.title: Wo Zai Tianting Shou Feipin
data.title_japanese: 我在天庭收废品
title_synonyms: Recycling Scrap in the Celestial Court
data.synopsis:
In a modern martial arts world, Zhao Xin unexpectedly inherits the Celestial Realm's recycling station. This grants him not only the aid of numerous immortals but also the admiration of many beauties, ultimately leading him to the pinnacle of martial arts.

(Source: WeTV)
